text: Stepping into the open entryway of this contemporary space, I feel a blend of curiosity and estrangement. The stark lights and shadows produce a quiet, almost clinical calm. As I move towards the vibrant wall of innovation, greeted by bold colors and the words 'Responsive and rapidly evolving,' I sense a pulse of excitement. Here, among signs of research and human-machine collaboration, I’m struck by wonder and a subtle tension between progress and understanding our own place in this world.
